{{Quote|How can I serve the Empire?|A Transport Ship pilot|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The '''Transport Ship''' was an aquatic [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to [[Transport/Legends|transport]] troops or personnel across bodies of [[Water/Legends|water]].

{{Gamemechanics}}
Transport Ships under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] were used during the [[Reytha campaign]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].
{{Endgame}}

{{Veh-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Transport Ships appear in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] expansion pack [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']]. They may be built during the Galactic Empire campaign or in multiplayer.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''
